text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 274 

PRE_ICL_MONPP_COPAY_DAILY 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Copay Split Network Standard Mail Order — 1 day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order pharmacy 
within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit
